metadata.short_desc: Generate images with multiple providers and models.
metadata.desc: A universal image generation plugin that supports multiple image generation providers, models, and generation workflows.

dashboard.title: Universal Image Generation Dashboard
dashboard.description: Submit generation tasks, monitor the queue, and download results inside AstrBot WebUI.

form.title: Create generation task
form.promptPlaceholder: Describe the image you want, or select only presets/personas.
form.referenceHint: Supports jpg/png/webp/gif/heic/heif, limited by plugin settings.
form.referenceUnsupported: The current adapter does not declare image-to-image support.
form.resultEmptyDescription: Progress, errors, and generated images stay on this page so you do not need to leave Generate.

tasks.title: Task queue
tasks.keywordPlaceholder: Task ID / prompt / preset / persona / model / UMO

detail.emptyTitle: Select a task to view details
detail.emptyDescription: Task results, errors, and download actions will appear here.
detail.title: Task detail

enable_llm_tool.hint: Select which tools the LLM can call: image generation, task management, preset query, and preset editing.

api_providers.hint: Configure one or more image generation providers. Model selection uses the format "Provider name/Model name".

gemini.name: Gemini API
gemini.hint: Call Gemini native image generation APIs.

base_url.hint: Optional. Leave empty to use the adapter default endpoint, or set a compatible endpoint.

api_keys.hint: Enter API keys or tokens for this provider. Multiple keys can be configured for rotation.

available_models.hint: Used by the /生图模型 command. Keep this list aligned with models available to your account.

capability_options.hint: Select the capabilities actually supported by the current model. Unselected capabilities will not be used in requests.

timeout.hint: Set to 0 to use the timeout from Runtime Control.

max_retry_attempts.hint: Set to 0 to use the retry count from Runtime Control.

openai_chat.name: OpenAI Chat compatible API
openai_chat.hint: Call generic OpenAI Chat Completions compatible image generation APIs. Use this for models or relay services that return images from /v1/chat/completions.

base_url.hint: Enter an OpenAI Chat Completions compatible endpoint.

api_keys.hint: Enter API keys or tokens for this provider. Multiple keys can be configured for rotation.

available_models.hint: Used by the /生图模型 command.

capability_options.hint: Select the capabilities actually supported by the current model. Unselected capabilities will not be used in requests.

timeout.hint: Set to 0 to use the timeout from Runtime Control.

max_retry_attempts.hint: Set to 0 to use the retry count from Runtime Control.

prompt_prefix.hint: Text prefix sent to Chat Completions. Leave empty to send the user prompt directly.

modalities.hint: The modalities field sent in the request body. Some compatible APIs require image and text. Leave empty to omit this field.

extra_body_json.hint: Optional. Enter a JSON object to merge into the top level of the Chat Completions request body.

base_url.hint: Optional. Leave empty to use the adapter default endpoint, or set a compatible endpoint.

api_keys.hint: Enter API keys or tokens for this provider. Multiple keys can be configured for rotation.

available_models.hint: Used by the /生图模型 command. Keep this list aligned with models available to your account.

capability_options.hint: Select the capabilities actually supported by the current model. Unselected capabilities will not be used in requests.

timeout.hint: Set to 0 to use the timeout from Runtime Control.

max_retry_attempts.hint: Set to 0 to use the retry count from Runtime Control.

model_family.hint: Affects the OpenAI request format. auto detects the gpt-image or dall-e family from the model name.

volcengine_ark.name: Volcengine Ark API
volcengine_ark.hint: Call the Volcengine Ark /api/v3/images/generations image generation API.

base_url.hint: Defaults to https://ark.cn-beijing.volces.com. You can also enter a full endpoint that includes /api/v3.

api_keys.hint: Enter Volcengine Ark API keys. Requests are sent with Bearer tokens.

available_models.hint: Used by the /生图模型 command. Keep this list aligned with actual model IDs or endpoint IDs in the console.

capability_options.hint: Select the capabilities actually supported by the current model. Seedream models usually support text to image, image to image, aspect ratio, and resolution.

timeout.hint: Set to 0 to use the timeout from Runtime Control.

max_retry_attempts.hint: Set to 0 to use the retry count from Runtime Control.

watermark.hint: When enabled, add an "AI generated" watermark to the bottom-right corner of the image.

sequential_image_generation.hint: auto allows the model to generate an image set from the prompt. disabled only generates a single image.

sequential_max_images.hint: Only effective when image set mode is auto. The total number of reference images and generated images cannot exceed 15.

max_reference_images.hint: Limit the number of reference images used in a single request, up to 14.

optimize_prompt_mode.hint: standard has higher quality but takes longer. fast is quicker with lower quality. Leave empty to omit this field.

enable_web_search.hint: Supported only by some models. When enabled, the model can decide whether to search the internet.

siliconflow_adapter.name: SiliconFlow API
siliconflow_adapter.hint: Call the SiliconFlow /v1/images/generations image generation API.

base_url.hint: Defaults to https://api.siliconflow.cn. You can also enter an endpoint that includes /v1; the plugin will normalize it automatically.

api_keys.hint: Enter SiliconFlow API keys. Requests are sent with Bearer tokens.

available_models.hint: Used by the /生图模型 command. Keep this list aligned with models available to your account.

capability_options.hint: Select the capabilities actually supported by the current model. Unselected capabilities will not be used in requests.

timeout.hint: Set to 0 to use the timeout from Runtime Control.

max_retry_attempts.hint: Set to 0 to use the retry count from Runtime Control.

negative_prompt.hint: Optional. When set, it is sent as negative_prompt in the request.

num_inference_steps.hint: Range: 1–100. Set to 0 to omit this field.

guidance_scale.hint: Range: 0–20. Leave empty to omit this field.

gitee_ai.name: Gitee AI API
gitee_ai.hint: Call Gitee AI /v1/images/generations and /v1/images/edits image APIs.

base_url.hint: Defaults to https://ai.gitee.com. You can also enter a compatible endpoint.

api_keys.hint: Enter Gitee AI access tokens. Requests are sent with Bearer tokens.

available_models.hint: Used by the /生图模型 command. Keep this list aligned with models available to your account. In auto endpoint mode, the plugin chooses the generation or edit API by model and reference images.

image_endpoint.hint: auto chooses the generation or edit API automatically. generations and edits force a specific endpoint.

capability_options.hint: Select the capabilities actually supported by the current model. Unselected capabilities will not be used in requests.

timeout.hint: Set to 0 to use the timeout from Runtime Control.

max_retry_attempts.hint: Set to 0 to use the retry count from Runtime Control.

base_url.hint: Optional. Leave empty to use https://apihub.agnes-ai.com, or set a compatible endpoint.

api_keys.hint: Enter API keys or tokens for this provider. Multiple keys can be configured for rotation.

available_models.hint: Used by the /生图模型 command. Keep this list aligned with models available to your account.

response_format.hint: base64 returns images directly. url returns remote links.

capability_options.hint: Select the capabilities actually supported by the model. Aspect ratio is mapped to the size field and is not sent as aspect_ratio.

timeout.hint: Set to 0 to use the timeout from Runtime Control.

max_retry_attempts.hint: Set to 0 to use the retry count from Runtime Control.

jimeng2api.name: Jimeng reverse API
jimeng2api.hint: Call image generation services based on the iptag/jimeng-api project.

api_keys.hint: If the service enables authentication, enter access keys. Multiple keys can be configured for rotation.

available_models.hint: Used by the /生图模型 command. Keep this list aligned with models actually supported by the service.

capability_options.hint: Select the capabilities actually supported by the current model. Unselected capabilities will not be used in requests.

timeout.hint: Set to 0 to use the timeout from Runtime Control.

max_retry_attempts.hint: Set to 0 to use the retry count from Runtime Control.

base_url.hint: Optional. Leave empty to use the adapter default endpoint, or set a compatible endpoint.

api_keys.hint: Enter API keys or tokens for this provider. Multiple keys can be configured for rotation.

available_models.hint: Used by the /生图模型 command. Keep this list aligned with models available to your account.

capability_options.hint: Select the capabilities actually supported by the current model. Unselected capabilities will not be used in requests.

timeout.hint: Set to 0 to use the timeout from Runtime Control.

max_retry_attempts.hint: Set to 0 to use the retry count from Runtime Control.

custom_http.name: Custom HTTP API (Beta)
custom_http.hint: Advanced configuration: customize JSON request bodies, request headers, and response image extraction paths for HTTP image APIs that return base64, data URLs, or image URLs.

base_url.hint: Base API endpoint. The custom HTTP adapter does not automatically remove the /v1 path.

endpoint.hint: Optional. Joined with the API endpoint, such as /v1/images/generations. If a full http(s) URL is entered, it is used directly.

request_method.hint: POST is recommended. Choose another method only when the target API explicitly requires it.

api_keys.hint: Optional. Use {api_key} in JSON templates. Multiple keys are rotated automatically.

available_models.hint: Used by the /生图模型 command. Use {model} in JSON templates.

capability_options.hint: Select capabilities actually supported by the API. Unselected capabilities will not be used in requests.

timeout.hint: Set to 0 to use the timeout from Runtime Control.

max_retry_attempts.hint: Set to 0 to use the retry count from Runtime Control.

headers_json.hint: A JSON object. Supports placeholders such as {api_key}, {model}, {prompt}, and {task_id}. Authorization headers with an empty Bearer value are omitted automatically.

query_params_json.hint: A JSON object sent as URL query parameters. Supports placeholders such as {api_key}, {model}, {prompt}, and {task_id}.

payload_json.hint: A JSON object. Supports placeholders such as {prompt}, {model}, {aspect_ratio}, {resolution}, {reference_images_data_url}, {reference_images_base64}, {reference_image_0}, and {task_id}. If a field value exactly equals an array placeholder, it is written as an array instead of a string.

image_result_path.hint: Path used to extract image data from the JSON response. Supports dot notation and * wildcards, such as data.*.b64_json and data.*.url. Multiple paths can be separated by newlines or commas.

image_result_type.hint: auto detects base64, data URLs, and HTTP image URLs by content.

error_result_path.hint: Optional. Path used to extract error messages from the JSON response. When empty, error.message and error are tried.

success_status_codes.hint: Responses with these HTTP status codes are treated as successful.

generation.hint: Configure the default model, default image parameters, result display, and task start message.

model.hint: Can be switched with the /生图模型 command. Format: "Provider name/Model name". Leave empty to use the first available model automatically.

default_image_count.hint: Default number of images generated by a single task when not specified in commands or LLM tools.

max_image_count.hint: Limit the maximum number of images in a single generation task. Requests above this value are truncated automatically.

max_images_per_message.hint: When multiple images are generated, this limits how many images each message carries. Extra images are sent in batches, and result information is appended to the last batch.

default_aspect_ratio.hint: Default aspect ratio. Select "Not specified" to omit the aspect ratio field from requests.

default_resolution.hint: Default resolution. Select "Not specified" to omit the resolution field from requests.

result_info_items.hint: Information appended after successful generation. Usage is shown only when daily quota is enabled.

start_task_message_template.hint: Message sent when a task starts. Supported placeholders: {reference_image_count}, {image_count}, {count}, {prompt}, {preset}, {presets}, {persona}, {personas}, {aspect_ratio}, {resolution}, {task_id}, {model}, {mode}, {reference_images_block}, {image_count_block}, {count_block}, {preset_block}, and {persona_block}. Leave empty to send nothing.

generation_runtime.hint: Configure image generation runtime timeout, retries, concurrency, queue limits, non-retryable errors, and debug logging.

timeout.hint: Default timeout for a single model request. Provider settings can override this.

max_retry_attempts.hint: Default retry count after a single model request fails. Provider settings can override this.

debug_request_logging.hint: When enabled, JSON request and response structures are printed in debug logs. Long strings, Base64, and data URLs are summarized.

show_user_error_details.hint: When enabled, generation failure messages include sanitized and summarized remote error details. When disabled, only the API error type and status code are shown.

non_retryable_status_codes.hint: Requests fail immediately without retrying when these HTTP status codes are returned. Useful for parameter errors, authentication failures, permission issues, or missing resources.

non_retryable_error_keywords.hint: Requests fail immediately without retrying when the error text contains these keywords. Useful for parameter errors, unsupported models, or content safety rejections.

max_concurrent_tasks.hint: Maximum number of simultaneous image model API requests. Multi-image tasks run requests within this limit and continue submitting remaining requests as earlier ones finish.

max_running_generation_tasks.hint: Maximum number of full generation tasks running at the same time. Each running task is still constrained by request-level concurrency.

max_queued_generation_tasks.hint: Maximum number of full generation tasks waiting to start, excluding running tasks. New tasks are rejected when the queue is full.

user_limits.hint: Configure session blacklist, user rate limits, daily quota, and reference image size limits.

umo_blacklist.hint: Enter unified_msg_origin (UMO) values. Matching sessions cannot use image generation.

admin_bypass_limits.hint: When enabled, AstrBot administrators can bypass the session blacklist, rate limit, and daily quota, while daily usage is still recorded.

umo_whitelist.hint: Enter unified_msg_origin (UMO) values. Matching sessions bypass the session blacklist, rate limit, and daily quota, while daily usage is still recorded.

blacklist_block_message.hint: Text returned to the user when the blacklist is matched. Leave empty to send nothing.

rate_limit_seconds.hint: Minimum interval between two requests from the same user. Set to 0 to disable rate limiting.

max_image_size_mb.hint: Reference images larger than this limit are ignored.

enable_daily_limit.hint: When enabled, limit how many images each user can generate per day.

daily_limit_count.hint: Maximum number of images each user can generate per day.

safety_audit.hint: Configure prompt audit, image audit, and audit whitelist.

umo_whitelist.hint: Enter unified_msg_origin (UMO) values. Matching sessions skip prompt and image audits.

blocked_words.hint: Reject image generation directly when the prompt contains any of these words.

enable_ai_audit.hint: When enabled, call a chat model to audit user prompts.

ai_provider_id.hint: Select the chat model provider used for prompt audit. Leave empty to use the current session model.

max_retry_attempts.hint: Maximum attempts when the audit model call fails, returns empty output, or cannot be parsed.

ai_prompt.hint: Prompt sent to the audit model. Supports the {prompt} placeholder. If the placeholder is missing, the user prompt is appended automatically.

enable_ai_audit.hint: When enabled, call a chat model to audit generated images before sending them.

ai_provider_id.hint: Select the chat model provider used for image audit. Leave empty to use the current session model.

max_retry_attempts.hint: Maximum attempts when the audit model call fails, returns empty output, or cannot be parsed.

ai_prompt.hint: Prompt sent to the audit model. The current prompt is included only when {prompt} is present.

prompt_templates.hint: Centrally configure preset prompts and persona templates. View them with /预设 and use them by name with /生图.

presets.hint: Each item uses the format "name:prompt". JSON objects with prompt, aspect_ratio, resolution, and description are also supported.

personas.hint: Configure reusable persona descriptions and reference images. When using /生图 <persona name> [extra prompt], the persona is applied automatically.

persona_name.hint: Used for matching in the /生图 command.

persona_prompt.hint: Prepended to the prompt when generating images with this persona.

persona_image.hint: Optional. Used as an image-to-image reference image.

generation_task_history.hint: Configure whether generation task history is persisted, and set history count and retention days.

enable_generation_task_history.hint: When enabled, task status, session identifier, prompt summary, result paths, and error summary are saved in the plugin data directory. When disabled, tasks are kept only in runtime memory.

generation_task_history_limit.hint: Maximum number of generation task records to keep. Active tasks are not removed by history trimming.

generation_task_history_retention_days.hint: Completed tasks older than this number of days are cleaned up. Set to 0 to disable time-based cleanup and use only the count limit.
